import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
keys = list\(d.keys\(\)\)
print\('top keys:', keys\)
state = d.get\('state', {}\)
print\('state keys:', list\(state.keys\(\)\)\)
# check for any token/usage related keys
for k in state:
    v = state[k]
    if isinstance\(v, \(int, float, str\)\) and \('token' in k.lower\(\) or 'usage' in k.lower\(\) or 'cost' in k.lower\(\) or 'model' in k.lower\(\)\):
        print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
